name: The Gnasher
flavor: A small axe with a vicious bite.

name: The Hand of Broc
flavor: Calloused leather that drinks poison harmlessly.

name: Torch of Iro

flavor: A curved blade that drinks deep.

name: Felloak

name: Greyform

flavor: A spellweaver's sash, threaded with mana.

name: Pluckeye
flavor: A keen-eyed hunter's first bow.

name: Axe of Fechmar
flavor: An icy hand-axe of barbaric make.

name: Coif of Glory
flavor: A worn coif blessed by a long-dead king.

name: Deathspade
flavor: A spade-headed hatchet, dull but heavy.

name: Gorefoot
flavor: Bloodstained boots that quicken every stride.

name: Skewer of Krintiz
flavor: A thin, vicious thrusting blade.

name: Nagelring
flavor: The merchant's favorite — more gold means more treasures to find.

name: Stoutnail
flavor: A simple iron-banded club. Reliable.

name: Blinkbat's Form

name: Bloodfist

name: Duskdeep

name: Shadowfang

name: Snakecord

name: Gleamscythe

name: Witherstring

name: Howltusk

name: The Centurion

flavor: A shadow-forged disk — magic glances aside.

name: Bloodrise

flavor: The blacksmith of Tristram's signature blade.

name: Tarnhelm

flavor: A pale gem that watches from the wearer's chest.

flavor: A heavy bloodied club, well-used.

flavor: A relic from a long-buried fire-temple.

name: Lance Guard

flavor: A holy scepter, neglected but still potent.

name: Doomslinger

name: Hawkmail
flavor: Light scales, swift as a hawk.

name: Darkglow

name: Nightsmoke

name: Rogue's Bow

name: Stormchaser

flavor: Worn by an apprentice of the Vizjerei. It bears no fear of fire.

flavor: A larger Vizjerei apprentice glove — fire-laced.

flavor: A guildsmen's mark, charged with storm.

name: Stormstrike

flavor: A merchant-prince's gilded sash.

name: Hellclap

name: Ichorsting
flavor: A barbed axe — wounds fester for days.

name: Ring of the Leech

name: Boneflesh
flavor: A grim coat of bone-plates lashed with sinew.

name: Ironstone
flavor: Stone-headed, iron-banded — primitive but lethal.

name: Peasant Crown
flavor: A simple circlet that brought a serf to glory.

name: Silks of the Victor
flavor: Worn by champions of the arena.

name: The Spirit Shroud
flavor: A whisper-thin robe haunted by past wearers.

name: Visceratuant
flavor: A spell-shield carved with binding glyphs.

name: Frostburn
flavor: Frozen gauntlets that amplify both mana and chill.

name: Rattlecage
flavor: Skull-charms clatter as you move.

flavor: Stripped from the great serpent-mages of the deep jungles.

name: items.unique.stone-of-jordan

flavor: A pilgrim's worn boots — quick and tireless.

flavor: A clergy's foul-water sprinkler — repurposed.

name: Venom Grip
flavor: Snakeskin gauntlets that drip with venom.

flavor: A widow's wand — it weeps for the dead.

name: Culwen's Point

name: Rockstopper
flavor: Forged of the sturdiest stone.

flavor: A clan-mace blackened with old soot.

flavor: A red-hot point that never cools.

flavor: A tribe-chief's plate, banded in cold iron.

flavor: A jagged hook from the cold deeps.

flavor: A vicious bearded axe with a hair-thin edge.

name: The Nokozan
flavor: A relic from a buried fire-temple.

name: Blacktongue
flavor: A tongue-shaped blade, drips with venom.

flavor: A thief's blade — even the dust turns to coin.

name: Blastbark

name: Langer Briser
flavor: An old siege-bow, repurposed.

name: Skystrike
flavor: An archer-king's bow — calls down lightning.

flavor: A pickaxe-dagger — pries armor open.

name: Crow Caw

name: Gloom's Trap

name: Goldskin

name: Knell Striker

flavor: A desert wanderer's lucky charm.

flavor: A leech-shaped blade that drinks blood.

flavor: Necromantic gloves — your touch withers the living.

name: Shaftstop
flavor: Shrugs off arrows like raindrops.

name: Spirit Ward

name: The Atlantean Sword

flavor: A swirling crystal orb, said to peer beyond the veil between worlds.

flavor: An orb of swirling crystal — sight beyond sight.

flavor: A vampire-lord's belt — drains the unwary.

flavor: A mummified scarab-mage's funerary disk.

flavor: A storm-spear from the celestial heights.

name: Demonhorn's Edge (Greater)
flavor: A larger demon-horn helm of greater make.

name: Halaberd's Reign (Greater)
flavor: A barbarian crown of unmatched lineage.

name: Messerschmidt's Reaver
flavor: A masterwork two-hander of staggering reach.

name: Tomb Reaver
flavor: Unearthed from a king's tomb. It grants power beyond measure.

name: items.unique.tyraels-might
flavor: Forged in the High Heavens by the Archangel of Justice himself.

name: items.unique.arkaines-valor
flavor: The legendary armor of an ancient hero of the heroes ages.

name: Azurewrath
flavor: The blade of a celestial warrior. Demons flee before its light.

name: Ethereal Edge
flavor: A blade glimpsed half in this world, half in another.

name: The Gladiator's Bane
flavor: Worn into countless arenas. None of its foes survived.

name: The Cranium Basher
flavor: It does what its name suggests.

name: The Cranium Basher (Greater)
flavor: A maul of unmatched bone-shattering force.
